remarks: Set on a quiet cul-de-sac, this beautifully renovated 5-bedroom, 4-bath Colonial offers a rare blend of luxury, convenience and effortless living. Designed w/both entertaining and everyday comfort in mind, the flexible floor plan features spacious living spaces filled with natural light. The living room, centered around a wood-burning fireplace, creates a warm and inviting atmosphere, while the dining room, currently styled as an office, offers versatility. At the heart of the home is a stunning chef's kitchen, featuring an oversized island, Sub-Zero refrigerator, and Wolf range. It flows seamlessly into a spacious dining area and outdoor patio, making indoor-outdoor entertaining effortless. The first floor bedroom (or office) with adjacent bath and mudroom further enhances flexibility. Upstairs, the primary suite is a private retreat, complete with walk-in closet and marble bath. Three additional, generously sized bedrooms, three beautifully appointed baths, a dedicated study area with built-in desk, and a laundry room provide exceptional functionality for easy living. The finished lower level offers flexible space for a media room, gym, or playroom. Outside, enjoy the ultimate backyard experience with a fully fenced, flat yard and stone patio designed for summer entertaining and relaxed evenings at home. Walkable to shopping, dining, and the train, this home is perfectly positioned for today's lifestyle while offering the privacy and charm buyers seek. One car garage.
